text: I am not in danger, Skyler. I am the danger.
speaker: Walter White
contextNote: Walt asserts dominance during escalating pressure at home and in the drug trade.

speaker: Jesse Pinkman
contextNote: Jesse celebrates the chemistry breakthrough with chaotic enthusiasm.

text: I hide in plain sight, same as you.
speaker: Gustavo Fring
contextNote: Gus reveals strategic parallels between his facade and Walt's double life.

text: You got one part of that wrong. This is not meth.
speaker: Walter White
contextNote: The fulminated mercury scene establishes Walt's calculated intimidation.

text: Shut the hell up and let me die in peace.
speaker: Mike Ehrmantraut
contextNote: Mike's final words confront Walt with the cost of his ego.
